caffeine.citation: Caffeine is zero for all foods/recipes except tea, coffee, cocoa/chocolate items.

alcohol.citation: Alcohol is zero for all seed foods/recipes unless name indicates alcoholic beverage.

cholesterol.source: Nutritional biochemistry — cholesterol absent in plants
cholesterol.citation: Cholesterol is zero for plant-only foods.

added-sugars.source: Nutritional science — added sugars in whole foods
added-sugars.citation: Added sugars are zero ONLY for whole unprocessed plant/animal foods where total sugars are sourced and the food is clearly not sweetened.
